content:
Table of Contents:
1. Disclaimer and Thanks
2. Kadath (Arc 1) Timeline, aka the main Timeline sheet
3. Astral (Arc 2) Timeline
4. Characters' Prototypes (pairing characters to their Lovecraftian counterparts) & Codenames
5. Misc. Trivia
6. G-sheet (warning, 18+ content)
7. F.A.Q.
8. Known Paradoxes/Errors

As usual, **spoilers for literally the entire game**. Don't come crying to me about a plot twist that you're not supposed to find out yet.

Feel free to correct me or contribute discussions and/or info here or in <#1326453763355185215>! I'm not well versed in Lovecraft mythos, so every bit helps.

This document is (mostly) done, but a lot of it is still in progress and subject to change when new info is available. 

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BCfu0RdP6A4SIE0XmoevGFTKp5qbilfiTViGwprpHv4/edit?usp=sharing
